title: Database Behavior
text: Database Behavior Determines whether the entity is stored in a database. If N , the Data Access and Database Path property values are ignored. Value Description "" Value inherited from the Supertype Entity. Y Entity data is stored in database. N Entity data is not stored in a database. Description The value of this property can only be set for Modeled Entity. It cannot be changed in a Subtype Entity or Component Entity. Applies To Entity Related Links Data Access Defines how an entity will access the data store—via a database path, or via an entity service. Database Path DBMS path to use when storing occurrences of this entity. This is a named route to the Uniface DBMS connector used to connect to the database. Valid values are Uniface default paths ($DEF, $SYS, $UUU), supported databases and file formats, and user-defined paths. The default is DEF. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
